items.title: goehou/tabbit-toy
items.content: 这是一个基于tabbit的研究包，可以转化成OAI格式出来，同时增加了会员认证功能和一键提取cookie的浏览器拓展，方便快速本地快速使用claude gpt等模型

items.title: Valorant-AI/Valorant-ai-aimbot-未检测到
items.content: Master Valorant with an undetectable AI aimbot and hardware-driven ESP overlay. Explore neural-network precision, Vanguard-safe external architecture, and humanized aiming algorithms designed for competitive dominance. Join our private Discord for instant access.
